summary: QuantrolOx and Manipal Academy of Higher Education announced a partnership to develop Quantum-Hub@MAHE at Manipal Institute of Technology, creating India’s first university-led, indigenous open-architecture quantum ecosystem. Funded by a seven-figure deal, the roadmap spans from sub-50 qubit systems to 1,000+ qubit industrial-grade platforms, in collaboration with European partners Bluefors, ConScience, and Qblox. Q-HUB@MAHE integrates hardware, incubation, research, and workforce training, including the Quantum EDGE Academy for hands-on learning with superconducting quantum hardware. Leaders Vishal Chatrath (QuantrolOx CEO), David Gunnarsson (Bluefors), Niels Bultink (Qblox), and Marcus Rommel (ConScience) highlight the strategic value of open, scalable architectures, workforce development, and global collaboration. The facility is set for inauguration in September 2026.
